title: LLM Proxy Configuration
description: Configuration for the LLM Proxy extension. Routes LLM API requests by model name and monitors token usage via Envoy metadata.

llm_configs.description: Path-matcher rules mapping request paths to LLM API kinds. If empty, default rules for OpenAI and Anthropic are auto-configured.

kind.description: LLM API kind for matched requests.

metadata_namespace.description: Filter metadata namespace for LLM proxy data. Defaults to "io.builtonenvoy.llm-proxy".

llm_model_header.description: Request header to set with the extracted model name.

clear_route_cache.description: Clear Envoy route cache after setting metadata, enabling route re-selection. Defaults to false.

StringMatcher.description: Matches a string by prefix, suffix, or regex. Exactly one must be set.

prefix.description: Match strings starting with this value.

suffix.description: Match strings ending with this value.

regex.description: Match strings satisfying this regular expression.
